basic_details.job_title: Central University of Punjab Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Central University of Punjab Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 10 July 2026 on the official website https://www.cup.edu.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Central University of Punjab Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PG in Social Sciences/Geography and public health discipline with minimum 55% marks for GEN/OBC (50% for SC/ST/PH) from a UGC recognized University/ Institutes.
qualification.details: Research Assistant: PG in Social Sciences/Geography and public health discipline with minimum 55% marks for GEN/OBC (50% for SC/ST/PH) from a UGC recognized University/ Institutes. Preference may be given to candidates who have research knowledge, GIS and remote sensing knowledge, data analysis and interpretation, and study area knowledge.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central University of Punjab Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Central University of Punjab Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.central_university_of_punjab: PG in Social Sciences/Geography and public health discipline with minimum 55% marks for GEN/OBC (50% for SC/ST/PH) from a UGC recognized University/ Institutes.

content_sections.heading: Central University of Punjab Research Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Central University of Punjab Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Central University of Punjab Research Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Central University of Punjab Research Assistant Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Research Assistant: PG in Social Sciences/Geography and public health discipline with minimum 55% marks for GEN/OBC (50% for SC/ST/PH) from a UGC recognized University/ Institutes. Preference may be given to candidates who have research knowledge, GIS and remote sensing knowledge, data analysis and interpretation, and study area knowledge.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Central University of Punjab Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Central University of Punjab Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Assistant position at Central University of Punjab?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Assistant post is 25th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a Postgraduate degree in Social Sciences, Geography, or a public health discipline with at least 55% marks (50% for SC/ST/PH) from a UGC recognized institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000 per month for the Research Assistant position.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Central University of Punjab Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with all required documents to the specified email address before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Research Assistant position announced by the Central University of Punjab in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Assistant position will be based on an Interaction cum Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Does the university offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories, as it is not explicitly mentioned in the summary.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Central University of Punjab recruitment is PRO-351 (2026).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, labeled as 'Official Notification PDF'.
